## Copilot review

After opening this PR, request a Copilot review:

1. Open the PR on GitHub
2. Click **Reviewers** → select **Copilot**
3. Address any feedback before merging

Copilot uses instructions from `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and `.github/instructions/`.
